attributes.title: [EXEC] Unique Active Attackers
attributes.visState: {"title":"[EXEC] Unique Active Attackers","type":"metrics","params":{"id":"exec-attackers-panel","type":"markdown","series":[{"id":"exec-attackers-series","label":"Attackers","split_mode":"everything","metrics":[{"id":"exec-attackers-cardinality","type":"cardinality","field":"source.ip"}],"separate_axis":0,"axis_position":"right","formatter":"number","value_template":"{{value}}","chart_type":"line","line_width":1,"point_size":1,"fill":"0.5","stacked":"none","override_index_pattern":0,"series_drop_last_bucket":0}],"time_field":"@timestamp","index_pattern":".alerts-security.alerts-default","use_kibana_indexes":false,"interval":"1y","time_range_mode":"entire_time_range","axis_position":"left","axis_formatter":"number","axis_scale":"normal","show_legend":0,"truncate_legend":1,"max_lines_legend":1,"show_grid":0,"tooltip_mode":"show_all","drop_last_bucket":0,"background_color":"transparent","filter":{"query":"kibana.alert.rule.name: pfSense* and kibana.alert.workflow_status: open and source.ip:*","language":"kuery"},"markdown":"{{#each _all}}## [{{ last.formatted }}](/app/dashboards#/view/soc-pfsense-alerts-open)\n\nUnique Active Attackers{{/each}}","markdown_css":"h2{margin:0 0 10px 0;text-align:center;font-size:48px;line-height:1.05}h2 a{color:#7dd3fc;text-decoration:none}h2 a:hover{text-decoration:underline}p{margin:0;text-align:center;font-size:16px;line-height:1.25;color:#bae6fd}","markdown_vertical_align":"middle","markdown_scrollbars":false,"markdown_openLinksInNewTab":false},"aggs":[]}
attributes.description: Executive KPI for unique active attackers with clickable value.
